title: 08 block repaints itself
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 supplies Tina, the dark car, and real neighborhood identity, but allows a new exterior-wide camera. Image 2 supports Tina and product only. Image 3 supplies the target coral, turquoise, lemon, cream, and teal music-video palette, not miniature scale, gummy fish, or palm placement. Create a wide view down one continuous suburban block with a dark car driving toward camera and Tina visible through the rear window. The houses are repainting themselves sequentially without visible painters. Far houses are fully bright Cuban colors, middle houses are visibly half gray and half saturated, and near houses remain colorless. Make the advancing boundary toward the car unmistakable across real architecture. No murals, tropical plants, model houses, magical particles, paintbrushes, rainbow gradient, or text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Follow the stated role of every reference image rather than blending all references indiscriminately. Preserve Tina as the same bookish eighteen-year-old young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz pouch. Tina's fixed meeting point is the back seat of the car: never move her into the driver or front passenger seat. Make the specified physical situation immediately legible in one 16:9 image. Keep transformations benign, youthful, tactile, and suitable for a live-action candy commercial. Avoid captions, borders, split screens, watermarks, generic candyland, random rainbow effects, body horror, violent wreckage, and added package copy.
